owner_operator_stated: Website states Dr. Sana Baig opened 'her first state-of-the-art dental practice' in Lincolnwood, presenting her as founder/owner of Lincolnwood Family Dental; the record's named entity, Dr. Emily Chen, is presented as an associate recently welcomed 'to our team,' not as owner.
notes: Record named entity is 'Chen Emily DDS' but the address (4368 W Touhy Ave, Lincolnwood, IL 60712 — exact match) is now the multi-doctor group practice 'Lincolnwood Family Dental,' founded/owned by Dr. Sana Baig; Dr. Emily Chen currently works there as an associate, not as the practice owner — this reads as an ownership change (Chen's individual practice appears to have become/been absorbed into Baig's group), not Dr. Chen's own solo practice. Record phone (708) 769-0853 does not match the site's listed phone 847-610-9272 (address match is the corroboration basis). No careers/hiring page found on the corroborated site.

Record's vendor_website_hint 'Perfectdentalny.Com' is confirmed WRONG — that domain belongs to an unrelated New York City practice (Lower East Side / Upper East Side offices), not this Lincolnwood location. No corroborated own-domain website was found for 'Perfect Dental Care' at 4433 W Touhy Ave Ste 360, Lincolnwood, IL 60712 (phone (847) 933-0255) — only third-party directory/social listings (Yelp, Groupon, Facebook, WebMD) show the address/phone, and a Facebook page exists but its address/phone content could not be retrieved to corroborate it as an owned site. Uncorroborated directory mentions suggest Dr. Isabelle Ayngorn practices there alongside her father Dr. Alexander Ayngorn, but this is not confirmed via a practice-owned website.

The named entity's own group website, childrensdentistry.net (doctors Leo Morton & Scott Shore, pediatric dentistry), currently lists only Glenview and Hoffman Estates offices in its live page content — it does NOT show this record's address (9101 N Greenwood Ave, Niles) or phone (847) 296-9100 anywhere on-site (Niles appears only in a stale page-title metadata fragment), so it cannot be corroborated as this specific location's current website per the address/phone rule. Third-party directories (BBB, Yelp) still list 9101 N Greenwood Ave Ste 308, Niles, IL 60714 as an address for this entity/Dr. Shore, with phone (847) 299-1095 or (847) 901-1095 depending on source — neither matches the record's phone (847) 296-9100, which a separate search instead associated with an unrelated practice (Optima Dental Care) at a different Niles address (7900 N Milwaukee Ave). This location may have been consolidated or closed by the parent practice; flagging as unverifiable rather than corroborating a stale/wrong association.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Priya Shah is stated as the practice owner on the website; Dr. Gary LaMantia is listed as 'Dentist' and Dr. Richard Mazanek as 'Mentor' — the record's named entity ('Lamantia & Mazanek Ltd.') no longer matches current ownership.
notes: Address (7942 W Oakton St, Niles, IL 60714) and phone ((847) 823-0260) both match the record exactly, and vendor_website_hint 'Familydentistryofniles.Com' is correct. However the practice now operates as 'Family Dentistry of Niles,' owned by Dr. Priya Shah — a change of ownership from the record's named entity 'Lamantia & Mazanek Ltd.' Drs. LaMantia and Mazanek remain at the practice in reduced roles ('Dentist' and 'Mentor'), consistent with a practice sale where the original namesake dentists stayed on staff. No dedicated careers page found on the corroborated site; a third-party search snippet referenced a hygienist job posting tied to the practice's email domain, but it was not located on the practice's own site, so it is not counted as a hiring page.

owner_operator_stated: Website/search sources state Dr. Boyarskiy 'opened his own practice in 2002,' establishing him as owner.
notes: Address matches exactly (8747 N Oketo Ave, Niles, IL 60714). Site phone (847) 299-9400 differs from the record's phone (847) 966-4566, but the address match alone is sufficient corroboration. Practice is an orthodontic specialty practice (Dr. Boyarskiy is an orthodontist, Northwestern-trained), not a general-dentistry group; record lists provider_count=2, but only 1 named provider (Dr. Boyarskiy) could be verified on the corroborated site. No careers/hiring page found.

This dental practice is CLOSED — Yelp lists 'WOLNIAK, DMD — CLOSED' at 7042 N Milwaukee Ave, Niles, IL 60714 (updated February 2026), and search results confirm the address now houses Kingsway Kourt, an indoor pickleball/event center that opened Summer 2025 — a completely unrelated, non-dental business now occupies this address. The record's vendor_website_hint 'Allsmilesfdc.Com' is WRONG: that site (AllSmiles Family Dental Center, Dr. Ronaldo Macam) is confirmed at a different address (8872 N Milwaukee Ave, Niles, phone 847-298-9676), not this location.
